name: Floral Crystal Bloom
description: A delicate and enchanting design featuring soft pink hues adorned with shimmering crystal accents. This style captures the essence of a blooming flower, offering a touch of elegance and sparkle to your everyday look.

name: Kawaii Pop Delight
description: A playful and vibrant take on the classic French manicure. This design features a crisp white tip enhanced with charming pastel accents and playful dots, adding a touch of fun and personality to your look.

name: Silver Marble Luxe
description: A sleek blend of white marble and molten silver accents. Designed for a bold, statement look with a refined edge.

name: Pearl Glaze Elegance
description: A soft, milky white base with a high-shine, glossy finish. Simple, classic, and effortlessly chic.

name: Noir Blossom Chic
description: A sophisticated blend of deep black and delicate white florals. This design captures the essence of timeless romance with a modern, edgy twist.

name: Nude Luxe
description: Minimalist nude tones for everyday elegance. Your nails, but better.

name: Cherry Blossom
description: Delicate cherry blossom art on a soft pink base. Spring on your fingertips.

name: Diamond Dust
description: Crystal-studded press-ons for those unforgettable special occasions.

name: Blush Mermaid Pearl
description: A dreamy blend of blush pink gradients, pearlescent shimmer, and delicate 3D shell details. Inspired by ocean elegance, this set brings a soft, magical glow to your look.
